Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

SAFGPL

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 79
Func Name: GPL

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "610201",
    "name": "Commande actuateurs",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "n° actuateur": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "nombre cycles commande ON-OFF": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "4101000000",
    "name": "Ecriture RAM",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Adresse": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "position dans la trame": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "type": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "46FF",
    "name": "Réinit apprentissages",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "2000",
    "name": "Réinit flags de panne",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "21",
    "name": "Requete generique",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Service": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 14,
    "sentbytes": "3150",
    "name": "Salve N°1 APV- Identification",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "mode du diagnostic APV N°1": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "boite de vitesse": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CONFIG": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "état BV": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FLGPP9": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "nombre cylindres": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "nombre voies du calculateur": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "numéro de calibration du logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "numéro de version du logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "numéro du fournisseur": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "numéro du programme": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "numéro RENAULT": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pane présente checksum programme ou calib erroné": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente absence de PMH": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente capteur cible inversé": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente checksum CORDAV et config stratégies erroné": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente checksum EEPROM erroné": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente EEPROM verlog": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente zone EEPROM apprentissage inutilisable": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "RDEF": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "semi full-group": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "sonde O2": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Syst AG": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Syst Renault": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Syst Vialle": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "type carburation": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "type GPL": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "type Injecteur": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "type moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "3251",

  {
    "minbytes": 27,
    "sentbytes": "3351",
    "name": "Salve N°2 PR - Controle entrées",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "mode du diagnostic PR N°2": {
